privileged_info_summary: This task is a synthetic GRC (Governance, Risk and Compliance) training scenario using the Eramba system. The task requires creating a Risk Exception titled 'Email Gateway Upgrade Delay - Phishing Risk Acceptance' with expiration date 2025-12-31, documenting a temporary acceptance of 'Phishing Attacks on Employees' risk. The description must reference a delayed 'Barracuda Email Security Gateway' deployment, mention 'compensating controls' including phishing simulations and enhanced SOC monitoring, reference approval by 'CISO David Chen', and discuss 'supply chain' constraints. All metadata values match the explicitly specified task instructions and are factually accurate for this controlled simulation environment.
